query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS holdings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  symbol VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,
  quantity DECIMAL(18,6) NOT NULL,
  market_value DECIMAL(18,6) NOT NULL
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS holdings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  symbol VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,
  quantity DECIMAL(18,6) NOT NULL,
  market_value DECIMAL(18,6) NOT NULL
)
